title: workers_united
description: A full-service digital platform connecting international employers with qualified workforce candidates. Streamlines the recruitment pipeline, visa documentation, and onboarding processes across European markets.
corporateDescription: A cross-border workforce platform built to connect European employers with qualified international candidates while simplifying recruitment, visa handling, and onboarding workflows.
matrixDescription: Workforce synchronization protocol active. Verified channels connect command hubs with remote operators while recruitment, visa packets, and onboarding sequences run without signal loss.

title: podovi
description: An e-commerce catalogue and advisory platform for premium flooring solutions. Features an extensive product library of engineered surfaces from leading European manufacturers.
corporateDescription: A premium flooring catalogue and advisory experience designed to present curated collections, technical details, and confident product selection for modern residential and commercial interiors.
matrixDescription: Surface module archive online. Engineered layers, finish specs, and material intelligence indexed for rapid upgrades across the spatial grid.

title: steel_concept
description: A corporate presentation platform for a steel and construction materials business, focused on product clarity, credibility, and direct B2B contact paths.
corporateDescription: A corporate presentation platform for a steel and construction materials business, focused on product clarity, company trust signals, and direct B2B contact paths.
matrixDescription: Industrial materials node detected. Steel inventory, supply signals, and partner access routes are organized through a hardened commercial interface.

title: konzorcijum
description: A real-time procurement intelligence and analytics platform. Features automated discovery, ingestion, and extraction of public tenders, utilizing a robust document analysis pipeline to monitor compliance, extract deadlines, and categorize multi-lot bids.
corporateDescription: An operative intelligence platform for public procurement. Scans and monitors real-time tenders, automates document analysis, extracts compliance terms, and organizes multi-lot opportunities.
matrixDescription: Procurement intelligence grid. [Tender_Discovery_Engine]: ONLINE. Real-time scanning and extraction of public compliance protocols, scanning and decoding restricted sector archives.
